name: DriftX Car Racing Simulator
summary: 🏎️ DriftX is an action-packed car racing simulator focused on drifting, stunt driving, and freestyle gameplay. Drive powerful cars through dynamic environments filled with ramps, loops, jumps, obstacles, and stunt props. Master realistic drifting physics, perform extreme aerial tricks, chain combos, and explore exciting stunt arenas designed for nonstop speed, creativity, and adrenaline-filled racing action.
